title: MacePvP Essentials
description: This texture pack, Mace PvP Essentials, will help you climb the ranks in MacePvP!
body:
### The Best Mace pack A **MacePvP TexturePack** to up your game in **MacePvP**! Here’s what it changes: * Low Shield * Small items (Food, XP bottles, etc.) * Non-obstructive Particles + No particles in blocks ### There are **Two versions** 1. **MacePvP Essentials** 2. **MacePvP Essentials [CM]** _[CM] stands for 'Custom Maces'_ Both change the same, but the [CM] version adds **Custom Maces** > **Breach IV Mace __(Blue)__** > > **Density V Mace __(Red)__** You need CIT-Resewn or Optifine to make it work
This pack is specifically designed for **MacePvP**, ensuring a smoother and more competitive experience. The **reduced shield size** improves visibility during battles, while **smaller items** keep your HUD clean and free from unnecessary distractions. The **smaller/unexistant particles** enhance combat clarity, making it easier to land hits and dodge attacks effectively. With **Breach IV (blue) and Density V (red) Maces**, you can quickly identify the best weapons to use. Dominate **MacePvP** with superior visuals and tactical advantages! Download now and sharpen your skills in the ultimate **MacePvP** experience! **DISCLAIMER: I didn't make the smaller models on items (also called Smaller Util). Vanilla tweaks made them. Credits:** **Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/**
